name: She Yuan (Wenxiong)
page_title: She Yuan (Wenxiong) 射援 (文雄) [Han, Liu Zhang, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
She Yuan’s Tai Wei, Huangpu Song, was impresssed with She Yuan’s ability so married his daughter to him. The Prime Minister, Zhuge Liang, appointed She Yuan as Zhai Zhou until he died.

full_text:
She Yuan (Wenxiong) 射援 (文雄)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
She Yuan (射援), styledWenxiong (文雄), was born in Youfufeng. Of good reputation, Huangfu Song admired his talents. Memorialised Liu Bei be King of Hanzhong. She Yuan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Zhang, and the Shu Kingdom.
